title: Centre for Frontier Technologies and Innovation | World Economic Forum
text: Centre for Frontier Technologies and InnovationCentre for Frontier Technologies and InnovationEmpowering leaders to unlock the potential of frontier technologies and accelerate their inclusive and sustainable adoption.Frontier technologies hold the potential for shared prosperity and innovative solutions.The Centre for Frontier Technologies and Innovation focuses on accelerating the adoption and application of frontier technologies in a safe and equitable manner.We promote innovation ecosystems and unlock cutting-edge insights to help frontier technologies scale faster – from the lab to real-world impact.4Key technology initiatives125+Business partners400+Innovators and Technology PioneersOur initiativesRobotics and Autonomous MobilityEmpowering industries to evolve, innovate, and create value by strengthening adoption readiness, driving real-world impact, and unlocking potential for economies and societies.BioBASEDA platform for accelerating the biotechnology sector to one that creates value and positive impact for people, industries, and the planet.Future of SpaceAims to advance a more prosperous and secure future for humanity on Earth, driven by accessible, competitive and widely adopted space capabilities.  Quantum Economy NetworkUnlocking the potential of quantum technologies by showcasing real-world quantum applications and advancing responsible governance.The Fourth Industrial Revolution NetworkOur global network of centres accelerates the responsible adoption of technology and transformation of industry at the local, regional, and global level.World Economic Forum CentresThe world is confronted with a range of unprecedented challenges, and it's crucial for businesses, government, and civil society to work together to find common solutions and take decisive action.Through its Centres, the Forum integrates public-private efforts to achieve greater impact.Centre for Frontier Technologies and InnovationPowered by© 2026 All rights
